questions.stem: Kevin ___ the plants every morning.
questions.explanation: every morning 表示平常習慣，Kevin 是第三人稱單數，所以用 waters。

questions.stem: We ___ our notebooks in class every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示平常發生的事，主詞是 we，所以用 use。

questions.stem: Sarah ___ the piano after school.
questions.explanation: after school 表示習慣，Sarah 是第三人稱單數，所以用 plays。

questions.stem: I ___ my lunch at noon every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示固定習慣，主詞是 I，所以用 eat。

questions.stem: The boys ___ basketball in the gym on Saturdays.
questions.explanation: on Saturdays 表示平常習慣，主詞是複數 boys，所以用 play。

questions.stem: Grandma ___ cookies for us every weekend.
questions.explanation: every weekend 表示習慣，Grandma 是第三人稱單數，所以用 bakes。

questions.stem: My aunt ___ in Taipei now.
questions.explanation: now 表示現在的狀態，My aunt 是第三人稱單數，所以要用 lives。

questions.stem: They ___ their teacher at the school gate every morning.
questions.explanation: every morning 表示習慣，所以主詞 they 用現在式 see。

questions.stem: Jack ___ his backpack to school every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示習慣，Jack 是第三人稱單數，所以要用 carries。

questions.stem: We ___ English with our teacher on Mondays.
questions.explanation: on Mondays 表示平常課表，主詞是 we，所以用 study。

questions.stem: The rabbit ___ fast in the yard every evening.
questions.explanation: every evening 表示習慣，The rabbit 是第三人稱單數，所以用 runs。

questions.stem: Emma ___ a storybook before bed every night.
questions.explanation: every night 表示固定習慣，Emma 是第三人稱單數，所以要用 reads。

questions.stem: Kevin ___ the plants yesterday morning.
questions.explanation: yesterday morning 表示過去，因此要用 watered。

questions.stem: We ___ our notebooks in class yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 used。

questions.stem: Sarah ___ the piano after school yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 played。

questions.stem: I ___ my lunch at noon yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 ate。

questions.stem: The boys ___ basketball in the gym last Saturday.
questions.explanation: last Saturday 表示過去，因此要用 played。

questions.stem: Grandma ___ cookies for us last weekend.
questions.explanation: last weekend 表示過去，所以要用 baked。

questions.stem: My aunt ___ in Kaohsiung ten years ago.
questions.explanation: ten years ago 表示過去，因此要用 lived。

questions.stem: They ___ their teacher at the school gate yesterday morning.
questions.explanation: yesterday morning 表示過去，所以要用 saw。

questions.stem: Jack ___ his backpack to school yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，carry 的過去式是 carried。

questions.stem: We ___ English with our teacher yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 studied。

questions.stem: The rabbit ___ fast in the yard yesterday evening.
questions.explanation: yesterday evening 表示過去，所以要用 ran。

questions.stem: Emma ___ a letter to her friend last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，因此要用 wrote。

questions.stem: Mom ___ the dishes after dinner yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 washed。

questions.stem: The boy ___ a picture for art class yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 drew。

questions.stem: Our class ___ a song at the school show last week.
questions.explanation: last week 表示過去，因此要用 sang。

questions.stem: Dad ___ me to the store yesterday afternoon.
questions.explanation: yesterday afternoon 表示過去，所以要用 took。

questions.stem: The students ___ quiet during the movie yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 kept。

questions.stem: My neighbor ___ his old bike last month.
questions.explanation: last month 表示過去，所以要用 fixed。
